# L/R Swaper Linux v2.8

Latest Linux release target for Pop!_OS, Ubuntu, Linux Mint, Debian, and other apt-based systems.

## Quick install

```bash
bash <(curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Tihulu/L-R-Swaper-and-EQ/main/linux/quick-install.sh)
```

## Includes

- Linux app moved into `linux/`
- one-line GitHub installer
- L/R swap and alternate swap modes
- L/R test controls
- bass/treble EQ
- volume and L/R balance controls
- three preset slots
- clean disable/unload behavior

## Package generated by workflow

`L-R-Swaper-Linux-v2.8.tar.gz`

## Release workflow

The dedicated Linux release workflow publishes tag `linux-v2.8` from the latest `main` commit.
